texto: No matter where one looked, the sky had a clean-washed appearance. There was not a trace of a cloud to be seen anywhere in its vast expanse. It was one of those days that made one want to open doors and gates to release the last traces of winter, to watch them disappear like thin wisps of smoke into the farthest reaches of the sky.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Der Nister: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “No matter where one looked, the sky had a clean-washed appearance. There was not a trace of a clo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, nature, seasons pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de seasons e spring.
